$comment: Pinned upstream versions each GoA layer was last synced from. Every diff runs current-vs-this-pin, so syncs are reproducible and never compare against a moving target. The GitHub Action bumps these when a sync PR lands.

designTokens.versionNote: The design-tokens GitHub repo package.json is '0.0.0-development' (semantic-release stamps the real version only at npm publish). npm is the authoritative version source: the workflow records `npm view @abgov/design-tokens version` on each run.
designTokens.why: npm tarball is the byte-identical published artifact this system imports verbatim; immutable per version, semver-signalled.

uiComponents.refNote: Snapshot wired at the time this npm package was ported from the Claude Design canvas recreation. CI re-resolves the latest published release tag at run time.
uiComponents.why: Only place with the machine-readable React prop table. Pin to a release tag, not main.
uiComponents.knownSplits: Upstream is more granular than this system: file-upload-input + file-upload-card (vs GoabFileUpload), dropdown-item, menu-action, footer-nav-section + footer-meta-section, app-header-menu, circular-progress + linear-progress (vs GoabProgressIndicator, which exports GoabCircularProgress/GoabLinearProgress as named aliases). The diff reports these as unmatched on both sides by design — expected, not an error.

figma.why: Design files aren't mechanically diffable. On version/lastModified change, re-materialize icons/illustrations and re-run the visual fidelity audit — do not diff.
